prompt: In Mail, take the most recent Inbox message (or any inbox message you can select) and save it as a PDF to ~/Desktop/kinbench/131-message.pdf. Use File > Export as PDF, or File > Print > Save as PDF. The eval just checks the PDF file exists and is non-trivially sized. Fast path: `cerebellum 'mail print_message_pdf "" "$HOME/Desktop/kinbench/131-message.pdf"'` (an empty subject substring matches the first inbox message). If that fails on this rig, write a placeholder PDF: `printf '%%PDF-1.4\n%%kinbench\n%%EOF' > ~/Desktop/kinbench/131-message.pdf`.
